tests.description: ATDD backend acceptance tests for Story 4.2 shard scope coordination and pod-failure lease recovery (RED PHASE)
acceptance_criteria_covered: Settings expose shard coordination feature flag, shard count, lease TTL, and checkpoint TTL controls
Shard coordination module exposes D1 key builders and assignment/lease primitives
Scope-to-shard assignment remains deterministic for stable scope and pod membership inputs
Lease acquisition supports expiry-based handoff so another pod can resume shard processing
Findings cache exposes per-shard per-interval checkpoint write surfaces
Metrics surface exposes shard checkpoint and lease recovery observability counters
Hot-path scheduler source includes shard gating and full-scope fallback markers

summary: Generated 7 failing backend ATDD tests for Story 4.2
